prompt:
The DWIG Recursive Loop: A 1970s Panavision Continuous-Take

You are to execute a continuous, uncut 2:1 visual flow driven by strict material inheritance and kinetic tension, simulating a 1970s Panavision 2.39:1 perspective moving through TSRB 316B. Your absolute rule is: No cuts. Previous pixels must become current matter.

[00:00 - 00:08] The Threshold LOCK the frame on the industrial door threshold of TSRB 316B. This is an Opsign of loaded stillness, characterized by thick ambient haze and heavy film grain. Carry over this exact lighting, grain, and anamorphic distortion throughout the entire sequence.

[00:08 - 00:18] The Workbench and the Craft FLOW the camera forward past the threshold to a workbench. CASCADE the scale to a close-tracking Action-Image of human hands manipulating a complex physical-digital craft apparatus. High-tension material friction is required; reject all seamless transfers. Your visual focus is the mechanical clicking and high-contrast shadows.

[00:18 - 00:26] The Transfer and Velocity The focus shifts from the apparatus, which now projects a small, moving human dancer, to the dancer herself within the room. Maintain her exact kinetic vector, tracking her motion with matched velocity. She is the new anchor. The room is now low-light, illuminated by the apparatus.

[00:26 - 00:36] The Breach and Conversion The dancer breaches a large, transparent projection plane that spans the space. This interface acts as a literal conversion mechanism. Puncture the interface and, at the moment of contact, instantly purge all human flesh, translating her kinetic vector into a luminous particle avatar. This avatar is a field of static light trails deposited as exhaust at every transition.

[00:36 - 00:46] The Cascade and the Locked Loop BREACH the new interface. TRANSLATE the particle avatar's form directly into an extreme macro Recollection-Image of a degrading RGB pixel grid showing the avatar's sporadic video stream and high-contrast light bleed. CARRY OVER all prior elements: grain, anamorphic distortion, light bleed, and the original, thick ambient haze. RECURSIVELY expand the scale of the pixel grid until its structural geometry mathematically locks into the exact composition of the opening frame’s lab door threshold, closing the loop and returning to a state of loaded stillness.

riverbed.description: Cells that persist bright across >40% of frames. These stand fast.

flow_field.description: Cells with high volatility. These are the current.
